overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at night during a thunderstorm. The character progresses from a grassy forested path into snow-covered alpine terrain with dramatic lightning illuminating the snow-capped peaks.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a winding dirt path through dense pine forest, weapons visible on his back

entered.detail: Dense dark pine trees lining the left side of the mountain path
Dense pine forest covering the right slope of the mountain
Winding dirt and grass path cutting through the mountain terrain
Dark storm clouds covering the night sky with occasional lightning
Grassy mountain slope rising on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forested mountain trail at night. Geralt walks along a winding dirt path flanked by dense pine forests on both sides. The stormy sky is partially visible through the tree canopy, creating a moody, atmospheric environment with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain pass with vista views

events.description: Lightning flash illuminates the sky and reveals snow-capped mountain peaks in the distance
Path opens into wide mountain vista with expansive views of snow-covered peaks ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the mountain trail as the forest opens up to reveal dramatic mountain vistas ahead

entered.detail: Distant snow-covered mountain peak becoming visible through the storm clouds
Expansive view of mountain range opening up ahead of the path

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a dramatic mountain vista as lightning flashes across the stormy sky. Snow-capped peaks become visible in the distance, and the path continues through more sparse vegetation. The lighting shifts as lightning illuminates the scene, highlighting the transition from enclosed forest to open alpine terrain.

events.description: Ground surface transitions from grass and dirt to snow-covered rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through snow-covered mountain terrain, approaching the snow line of the alpine region

entered.detail: White snow covering the ground and path ahead, with patches of exposed rock
Snow-covered mountain slope rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail transitions into a snow-covered alpine path as Geralt ascends higher into the mountains. The ground is now blanketed in snow with rocky outcrops visible beneath. The vegetation becomes sparse, and the storm continues with dark clouds overhead, creating a cold, isolated atmosphere in the high mountain environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a dark, enclosed forest into a desolate, snow-covered alpine peak. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path flanked by dense pine forests under a moody, stormy sky. As the forest opens up, the scene expands into a dramatic mountain vista where flashes of lightning illuminate distant snow-capped peaks and sparse vegetation. The trail then shifts into a high-altitude ascent, with the ground gradually becoming blanketed in snow and rocky outcrops. Finally, the environment settles into a cold, isolated alpine landscape under heavy dark clouds as the vegetation disappears entirely.
